narrative:
Precinct Center Township (precinct in Morgan County) has 457 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
